name: sea surface height
dataset_description: Parameters include dynamic sea surface height [SSH], sea surface height without the inverse barometer (IB) correction from atmospheric pressure loading [SSHNOIBC], the IB correction from atmospheric pressure loading [SSHIBC], and model sea level [ETAN]. The sea surface height fields include corrections for global mean steric height associated with global mean density changes in the Boussinesq volume-conserving model (i.e., the Greatbatch correction) and for sea-ice pressure loading.

name: ocean bottom pressure
dataset_description: Parameters include ocean bottom pressure with and without the contribution from atmospheric pressure loading [OBPGMAP, OBP], ocean bottom pressure anomalies with respect to their 2005-2010 means [OBPGMAPA, OBPAnoma], and hydrostatic ocean bottom pressure anomaly [PHIBOT]. Bottom pressure fields are provided in terms of equivalent water height.

name: ocean and sea-ice surface freshwater fluxes
fields: EXFpreci, EXFevap, EXFroff, EXFempmr, oceFWflx, oceSflux, SIatmFW, SFLUX, SIfwThru
dataset_description: Parameters include freshwater fluxes from precipitation, evaporation, runoff, and sublimation across the air/ocean interface [EXFpreci, EXFevap, EXFroff, EXFempmr] and air/sea-ice interface [SIatmFW, SIfwThru]; total freshwater fluxes across the ocean surface [oceFWflx]; and total salt flux and the net salt flux into the uppermost ocean grid cell [SFLUX, oceSflux].
internal_note: SIacSubl, SIrsSubl, and SIsnPrcp are removed for v4r6 because they are not used in the seaice_growth_adx model.

name: ocean and sea-ice surface heat fluxes
fields: EXFhl, EXFhs, EXFswdn, EXFlwdn, EXFswnet, EXFlwnet, EXFqnet, SIatmQnt, SIaaflux, oceQnet, oceQsw, TFLUX
dataset_description: Parameters include latent, sensible, downwelling short- and longwave radiative heat fluxes across the air/open ocean interface [EXFhl, EXFhs, EXFswdn, EXFlwdn], net shortwave, longwave, and total heat fluxes across the air/open ocean interface [EXFswnet, EXFlwnet,EXFqnet], heat fluxes across air/ocean + sea-ice interface [SIatmQnt, SIaaflux]; and the net total heat flux and net shortwave flux integrated across the entire ocean surface [oceQnet, oceQsw, TFLUX].

name: atmosphere surface state
fields: EXFatemp, EXFaqh, EXFpress, atmPload, EXFuwind, EXFvwind, EXFwspee
dataset_description: Parameters include atmosphere temperature [EXFatemp], humidity [EXFaqh], pressure and pressure anomaly [EXFpress, atmPload], winds in the model x and y-directions [EXFuwind, EXFvwind], and total wind speed [EXFwspee].

name: ocean mixed layer depth
dataset_description: Provides MXLDEPTH, a 2D ocean mixed layer field diagnosed using the potential density criterion of Kara et al. (2000). The mixed layer depth is defined here as the depth where potential density exceeds the surface potential density + delta rho, where delta rho = alpha(surface layer) * 0.8 degrees Celsius. Users can calculate mixed layer depth using different criteria as needed using the vertical stratification (DRHODR) or density anomaly (RHOAnoma) fields provided in the OCEAN_DENS_STRAT_PRESS dataset.

name: ocean and sea-ice surface and bottom stress
fields: EXFtaux, EXFtauy, oceTAUX, oceTAUY, botTauX, botTauY
dataset_description: Parameters include surface wind stress at the top of the ocean and sea-ice [EXFtaux, EXFtauy], total ocean surface stress [oceTAUX, oceTAUY], and ocean bottom stress [botTauX, botTauY] in the model x and y-directions. Total ocean surface stress includes contributions from wind stress and sea-ice drag.

name: sea-ice and snow concentration and thickness
dataset_description: Parameters include sea-ice concentration [SIarea], grid-cell averaged sea-ice and snow thickness [SIheff, SIhsnow], and sea-ice pressure loading [sIceLoad].

name: sea-ice velocity
dataset_description: Parameters include sea-ice velocity in the model x and y-directions [SIuice, SIvice].

name: ocean temperature and salinity
dataset_description: Parameters include seawater potential temperature [THETA] and salinity [SALT].

name: ocean density, stratification, and hydrostatic pressure
dataset_description: Parameters include seawater density anomaly [RHOAnoma], vertical stratification [DRHODR], and hydrostatic pressure calculated using fixed and time-varying vertical coordinates [PHIHYD, PHIHYDcR].

name: ocean velocity
dataset_description: Parameters include ocean velocity in the model x, y, and z-directions [UVEL, VVEL, WVEL].

name: Gent-McWilliams ocean bolus velocity
dataset_description: Parameters include the Gent-McWilliams ocean bolus velocity in the model x, y, and z-directions [UVELSTAR, VVELSTAR, WVELSTAR].

name: ocean three-dimensional parameterized mixing coefficients
dataset_description: Parameters include the time-invariant, three-dimensional coefficients for vertical diffusivity [DIFFKR], Gent-McWilliams cross-isopycnal diffusivity [KAPGM], and Redi along-isopycnal diffusivity [KAPREDI].

name: sea-ice and snow horizontal volume fluxes
dataset_description: Parameters include the horizontal volume fluxes of sea-ice and snow in the model x- and y-directions.

name: Gent-McWilliams ocean bolus transport streamfunction
dataset_description: Parameters include the ocean bolus transport streamfunction in the model x- and y-directions.

name: ocean three-dimensional volume fluxes
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional ocean volume fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Volume fluxes are calculated by multiplying ocean velocities with wet grid cell areas (i.e., horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate).

name: ocean three-dimensional potential temperature fluxes
fields: ADVx_TH, DFxE_TH, ADVy_TH, DFyE_TH, ADVr_TH, DFrE_TH, DFrI_TH
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean potential temperature fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional salinity fluxes
fields: ADVx_SLT, DFxE_SLT, ADVy_SLT, DFyE_SLT, ADVr_SLT, DFrE_SLT, DFrI_SLT, oceSPtnd
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean salinity fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: sea-ice salt plume fluxes
dataset_description: Parameters include the salt mass flux from sea-ice salt plumes per unit area (g m-2 s-1) and the depth of the salt plumes.
comment: oceSPflx is salt mass flux per unit area (g m-2 s-1), not salinity flux.

name: ocean three-dimensional momentum tendency terms in the model x-direction
fields: TOTUTEND, Um_Cori, Um_Advec, Um_Diss, Um_Ext, Um_dPhiX, AB_gU, Um_ImplD
dataset_description: Parameters include the total momentum tendency [TOTUTEND], and its components: Coriolis [Um_Cori], advection [Um_Advec], dissipation [Um_Diss], external forcing [Um_Ext], pressure gradient [Um_dPhiX], Adams-Bashforth term [AB_gU], and implicit dissipation [Um_ImplD] in the model x-direction.

name: ocean three-dimensional advective momentum tendency terms in the model x-direction
dataset_description: Parameters include the advective momentum tendency components in the model x-direction: vertical advection [Um_AdvZ3], advection of relative velocity [Um_AdvRe], and the gradient of kinetic energy [Um_dKEdx].

name: ocean three-dimensional dissipative momentum tendency terms in the model x-direction
dataset_description: Parameters include the dissipative momentum tendency components in the model x-direction: biharmonic dissipation [Um_Diss2, Um_Diss4], bottom drag [UBotDrag], side drag [USidDrag], and sea-ice drag [UShIDrag].

name: ocean three-dimensional momentum tendencies in the model y-direction
fields: TOTVTEND, Vm_Cori, Vm_Advec, Vm_Diss, Vm_Ext, Vm_dPhiY, AB_gV, Vm_ImplD
dataset_description: Parameters include the total momentum tendency [TOTVTEND], and its components: Coriolis [Vm_Cori], advection [Vm_Advec], dissipation [Vm_Diss], external forcing [Vm_Ext], pressure gradient [Vm_dPhiY], Adams-Bashforth term [AB_gV], and implicit dissipation [Vm_ImplD] in the model y-direction.

name: ocean three-dimensional advective momentum tendency terms in the model y-direction
dataset_description: Parameters include the advective momentum tendency components in the model y-direction: vertical advection [Vm_AdvZ3], advection of relative velocity [Vm_AdvRe], and the gradient of kinetic energy [Vm_dKEdy].

name: ocean three-dimensional dissipative momentum tendency terms in the model y-direction
dataset_description: Parameters include the dissipative momentum tendency components in the model y-direction: biharmonic dissipation [Vm_Diss2, Vm_Diss4], bottom drag [VBotDrag], side drag [VSidDrag], and sea-ice drag [VShIDrag].

name: ice-shelf freshwater and heat fluxes
dataset_description: Parameters include freshwater [SHIfwFlx] and heat [SHIhtFlx] fluxes from ice shelves.

name: ice-front freshwater and heat fluxes
dataset_description: Parameters include freshwater [ICFfwFlx] and heat [ICFhtFlx] fluxes from ice fronts.

name: sea-ice thermodynamic budget
fields: SIFao, SIFionet, SIFianet, SIFmi, SIFFlood, SIsnAccR, SIsnmltS, SIgamma, SIgmacnt
dataset_description: Parameters include heat fluxes associated with the sea ice thermodynamic budget including the air/open-ocean flux [SIFao], net ice conductive flux [SIFionet], net ice-atmosphere flux [SIFianet], ice-ocean flux [SIFmi]; mean ice thickness tendency from snow flooding [SIFFlood], snow accumulation and melt rate [SIsnAccR, SIsnmltS]; and a heat flux scaling term that prevents negative sea-ice mass [SIgamma] and a counter which increments whenever the scaling term is needed [SIgmacnt].

name: ocean relative vorticity, horizontal divergence, and kinetic energy
dataset_description: Parameters include the vertical component of relative vorticity [momVort3], the divergence of horizontal velocity [momHDiv], and the kinetic energy [momKE].
